i : Fin n
⊢ biasedUpdateState n net x i ≠ x → biasedLocalField n net x i ≠ 0 → biasedEnergyDiff n net x i < 0

  have h₃ : biasedEnergyDiff net x i ≤ 0 := biasedEnergy_decreasing
  have h₄ : biasedEnergyDiff net x i = -((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i := by
    apply biasedEnergyDiff_eq_neg_spinDiff_biasedLocalField
  rw [h₄]
  have h₅ : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h₅
    have h₆ : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal = 0 := by
      linarith
    have h₇ : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal = (x i).toReal := by linarith
    have h₈ : biasedUpdateState net x i i = x i := by
      have h₈₁ : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal = (x i).toReal := h₇
      have h₈₂ : biasedUpdateState net x i i = x i := by
        match x i with
        | SpinState.up =>
          have h₈₃ : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal = 1 := by
            simp_all [SpinState.toReal, biasedUpdateState]
            <;>
            (try { contradiction }) <;>
            (try { linarith }) <;>
            (try { split_ifs at * <;> simp_all [Finite.exists_fin_succ, Fin.ext_iff] <;> try { linarith } }) <;>
            (try { aesop })
          have h₈₄ : (x i).toReal = 1 := by
            simp_all [SpinState.toReal]
          have h₈₅ : biasedUpdateState net x i i = x i := by
            simp_all [biasedUpdateState]
            <;>
            (try { contradiction }) <;>
            (try { linarith }) <;>
            (try { split_ifs at * <;> simp_all [Finite.exists_fin_succ, Fin.ext_iff] <;> try { linarith } }) <;>
            (try { aesop })
          exact h₈₅
        | SpinState.down =>
          have h₈₃ : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal = -1 := by
            simp_all [SpinState.toReal, biasedUpdateState]
            <;>
            (try { contradiction }) <;>
            (try { linarith }) <;>
            (try { split_ifs at * <;> simp_all [Finite.exists_fin_succ, Fin.ext_iff] <;> try { linarith } }) <;>
            (try { aesop })
          have h₈₄ : (x i).toReal = -1 := by
            simp_all [SpinState.toReal]
          have h₈₅ : biasedUpdateState net x i i = x i := by
            simp_all [biasedUpdateState]
            <;>
            (try { contradiction }) <;>
            (try { linarith }) <;>
            (try { split_ifs at * <;> simp_all [Finite.exists_fin_succ, Fin.ext_iff] <;> try { linarith } }) <;>
            (try { aesop })
          exact h₈₅
      exact h₈₂
    have h₉ : biasedUpdateState net x i = x := by
      ext j
      by_cases h : j = i
      · rw [h]
        simp_all
      · simp_all [biasedUpdateState, Function.update_noteq]
    contradiction
  have h₆ : -((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i < 0 := by
    have h₆₁ : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := h₅
    have h₆₂ : biasedLocalField net x i ≠ 0 := h₂
    have h₆₃ : (-((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i) < 0 := by
      by_cases h₆₄ : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal > 0
      · have h₆₅ : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal > 0 := h₆₄

        have h₆₇ : biasedLocalField net x i > 0 ∨ biasedLocalField net x i < 0 := by

          · exact Or.inr h₂
          · exact Or.inl h₂
        cases' h₆₇ with h₆₇ h₆₇
        ·

have h₁ : biasedEnergyDiff net x i ≤ 0 := biasedEnergy_decreasing
  have h₂ : biasedUpdateState net x i ≠ x := by assumption
  have h₃ : biasedLocalField net x i ≠ 0 := by assumption
  have h₄ : biasedEnergyDiff net x i < 0 := by
    have h₅ : biasedEnergyDiff net x i = -((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i := by
      apply biasedEnergyDiff_eq_neg_spinDiff_biasedLocalField
    rw [h₅]
    have h₆ : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := by
      by_contra h₆
      have h₇ : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal = (x i).toReal := by linarith
      have h₈ : biasedUpdateState net x i = x := by
        have h₉ : ∀ j : Fin n, (biasedUpdateState net x i j : ℝ) = (x j : ℝ) := by
          intro j
          by_cases h₁₀ : j = i
          · rw [h₁₀]
            simp_all [biasedUpdateState, Function.update_same]
            <;>
            (try { cases x i <;> simp_all [SpinState.toReal] }) <;>
            (try { linarith }) <;>
            (try { field_simp at * <;> ring_nf at * <;> simp_all }) <;>
            (try { nlinarith })
          · simp_all [biasedUpdateState, Function.update_noteq]
            <;>
            (try { cases x j <;> simp_all [SpinState.toReal] }) <;>
            (try { linarith }) <;>
            (try { field_simp at * <;> ring_nf at * <;> simp_all }) <;>
            (try { nlinarith })
        have h₁₀ : (biasedUpdateState net x i : HopfieldState n) = x := by
          ext j
          have h₁₁ := h₉ j
          simp_all [HopfieldState.ext_iff]
          <;>
          (try { cases x j <;> simp_all [SpinState.toReal] }) <;>
          (try { linarith }) <;>
          (try { field_simp at * <;> ring_nf at * <;> simp_all }) <;>
          (try { nlinarith })
        exact h₁₀
      exact h₂ h₈
    have h₇ : -((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i < 0 := by
      have h₈ : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := h₆
      have h₉ : biasedLocalField net x i ≠ 0 := h₃
      have h₁₀ : (0 : ℝ) < ((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) ^ 2 := by
        apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
        exact h₈
      have h₁₁ : (0 : ℝ) < (biasedLocalField net x i) ^ 2 := by
        apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
        exact h₉

intro h1 h2
  have h3 : biasedEnergyDiff net x i ≤ 0 := biasedEnergy_decreasing
  have h4 : biasedEnergyDiff net x i = -((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i := biasedEnergyDiff_eq_neg_spinDiff_biasedLocalField
  rw [h4]
  have h5 : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal ≠ (x i).toReal := by
    intro h6
    have h7 : biasedUpdateState net x i = x := by
      apply HopfieldState.ext
      intro j
      by_cases h : j = i
      · simp_all [h, biasedUpdateState]
        <;>
        (try {split_ifs at * <;> simp_all [SpinState.toReal, Fin.ext_iff] <;> norm_num at * <;> linarith})
        <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [biasedLocalField, localField, weightsMatrix, toRealVector, Matrix.mulVec, Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]
          <;>
          ring_nf at * <;>
          norm_num at * <;>
          linarith
        })
      · have h8 : j ≠ i := h
        simp_all [h8, biasedUpdateState, Function.update_noteq]
        <;>
        (try {split_ifs at * <;> simp_all [SpinState.toReal, Fin.ext_iff] <;> norm_num at * <;> linarith})
        <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [biasedLocalField, localField, weightsMatrix, toRealVector, Matrix.mulVec, Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]
          <;>
          ring_nf at * <;>
          norm_num at * <;>
          linarith
        })
    exact h1 h7
  have h6 : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := by
    intro h7
    apply h5
    linarith
  have h7 : -((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i < 0 := by
    have h8 : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := h6
    have h9 : biasedLocalField net x i ≠ 0 := h2
    have h10 : ((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i > 0 := by
      -- We know that if the state changes, then either:
      -- 1. The new state is up and the old is down, so (new - old) > 0 and the local field is positive.
      -- 2. The new state is down and the old is up, so (new - old) < 0 and the local field is negative.
      -- In both cases, the product is positive.
      have h11 : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal > 0 ∨ (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal < 0 := by
        cases' lt_or_gt_of_ne h8 with h h
        · exact Or.inr h
        · exact Or.inl h
      cases' h11 with h11 h11
      · -- Case: (new - old) > 0
        have h12 : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal > 0 := h11
        have h13 : biasedLocalField net x i > 0 := by

    apply biasedEnergyDiff_eq_neg_spinDiff_biasedLocalField
  rw [h₄]
  have h₅ : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal = 1 ∨ (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal = -1 := by
    have h₅₁ : biasedUpdateState net x i i = 1 ∨ biasedUpdateState net x i i = -1 := by
      have h₅₂ : biasedUpdateState net x i i = 1 ∨ biasedUpdateState net x i i = -1 := by
        -- Prove that the updated state is either 1 or -1
        simp [biasedUpdateState, Function.update_same, Fin.val_mk, Fin.val_mk]
        <;>
        (try
          {
            split_ifs <;>
            (try { contradiction }) <;>
            (try {
              simp_all [SpinState.up, SpinState.down, Fin.val_mk]
              <;>
              norm_num
              <;>
              aesop
            })
          }) <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [SpinState.up, SpinState.down, Fin.val_mk]
          <;>
          norm_num
          <;>
          aesop
        })
        <;>
        (try {
          cases' lt_or_gt_of_ne h₂ with h₂ h₂ <;>
          simp_all [lt_irrefl] <;>
          norm_num <;>
          aesop
        })
        <;>
        aesop
      aesop
    cases h₅₁ with
    | inl h₅₁ =>
      simp [h₅₁, HopfieldState.toReal]
      <;>
      norm_num
    | inr h₅₁ =>
      simp [h₅₁, HopfieldState.toReal]
      <;>
      norm_num
  
  have h₆ : (x i).toReal = 1 ∨ (x i).toReal = -1 := by
    have h₆₁ : x i = 1 ∨ x i = -1 := by
      have h₆₂ : x i = 1 ∨ x i = -1 := by
        -- Prove that the current state is either 1 or -1
        simp [HopfieldState.toReal]
        <;>
        (try {
          cases x i <;>
          simp_all [SpinState.toReal]
          <;>
          norm_num
          <;>
          aesop
        })
        <;>
        aesop
      aesop
    cases h₆₁ with
    | inl h₆₁ =>
      simp [h₆₁, HopfieldState.toReal]
      <;>
      norm_num
    | inr h₆₁ =>
      simp [h₆₁, HopfieldState.toReal]
      <;>
      norm_num
  
  have h₇ : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal ≠ (x i).toReal := by
    intro h₇
    apply h₁
    have h₈ : biasedUpdateState net x i = x := by
      -- Prove that if the toReal values are equal, then the entire states are equal
      apply eq_of_sub_eq_zero
      apply funext
      intro j
      by_cases hj : j = i
      · -- Case: j = i
        simp_all [Function.update_same]
        <;>
        simp_all [hj]
        <;>
        (try contradiction)
        <;>
        (try linarith)
      · -- Case: j ≠ i
        simp_all [Function.update_noteq]
        <;>
        (try contradiction)
        <;>
        (try linarith)
    exact h₈
  
  have h₈ : -((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i < 0 := by
    have h₈₁ : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := by
      intro h₈₁
      apply h₇
      linarith
    have h₈₂ : biasedLocalField net x i ≠ 0 := h₂
    have h₈₃ : -((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i < 0 := by
      cases' lt_or_gt_of_ne h₈₁ with h₈₁ h₈₁ <;>
      cases' lt_or_gt_of_ne h₂ with h₂ h₂ <;>
      (try { contradiction }) <;>
      (try {
        cases' h₅ with h₅ h₅ <;>
        cases' h₆ with h₆ h₆ <;>
        (try { simp_all [h₅, h₆] <;> norm_num at * <;> nlinarith }) <;>
        (try {
          nlinarith
        })
      }) <;>
      (try {
        have h₈₄ : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal = 1 ∨ (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal = -1 := h₅
        have h₈₅ : (x i).toReal = 1 ∨ (x i).toReal = -1 := h₆
        cases' h₈₄ with h₈₄ h₈₄ <;>
        cases' h₈₅ with h₈₅ h₈₅ <;>
        (try { simp_all [h₈₄, h₈₅] <;> norm_num at * <;> nlinarith }) <;>
        (try {
          nlinarith
        })
      }) <;>
      (try {
        -- Use the fact that if (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal > 0, then the sign of -((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) is negative

cases' lt_or_gt_of_ne h₁₁ with h₁₂ h₁₂
              · exact Or.inr h₁₂
              · exact Or.inl h₁₂
            cases' h₁₂ with h₁₂ h₁₂
            ·
